final:
module d_flip_flop(
    input          clk,
    input          rst_n,
    input          d,
    output reg     q
);

always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) 
        q <= 1'b0;
    else 
        q <= d;
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
